title: Richards Bay, KwaZulu-Natal — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Richards Bay, KwaZulu-Natal: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Richards Bay is a city in KwaZulu-Natal with a population of 57,000. A major deep-water port city on the Zululand coast, known for its coal exports and industrial development.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
